title: JaredH4 PVP
description: PVP Modpack Used by JaredH4, Everything You Need For PVP/Hypixel Skyblock
body:
This Modpack was made by JaredH4 as a PvP focused Modpack. Has many commonly used PvP related features included such as Keystrokes, AutoGG and many others.

Designed mainly for Hypixel and other 1.8.9 PvP servers. Also has Not Enough Updates for Hypixel Skyblock.

There's a few mods which you will have to manually if you want the full version of the pack, I've put links to the downloads to those in the mods section.

Highly recommend you add Optifine 1.8.9: [Optifine 1.8.9 Download](http://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar)</br>
Adding this will greatly improve your fps (also there's zoom + shaders)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dX-BWBxw-KM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe></br>
(PvP modpack starts at 19:48)

## Mods:
- AutoGG: Automatically replies 'gg' at the end of a Hypixel minigame. [https://sk1er.club/mods/autogg](https://sk1er.club/mods/autogg)</br>
- ChromaHUD: Shows what armor you have without having to open your inventory. Note: You have to manually add this one: [https://sk1er.club/mods/ChromaHUD](https://sk1er.club/mods/ChromaHUD)</br>
- Ears: Extra skin customization.</br>
- Essential: All features disabled, used as a library mod.</br>
- Hypixel Autocomplete: This one is pretty obvious. [https://sk1er.club/mods/hypixel_auto_complete](https://sk1er.club/mods/hypixel_auto_complete)</br>
- Jtech Resource Pack: PvP resource pack I like to use, feel free to disable or replace.</br>
- Keystrokes: Shows on your screen when you press keys.</br>
- Nick Hider: Optional, hides your nickname if you have one. Note: You have to manually add this one: [https://sk1er.club/mods/nick_hider](https://sk1er.club/mods/nick_hider)</br>
- NotEnoughUpdates: Really useful for Hypixel Skyblock, tones of stuff.</br>
- Patcher: Fixes a ton of things. Note: You have to manually add this one: [https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher](https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher)</br>
- Replay Mod: Allows you to make replays, I use it for timelapses mainly.</br>
- Scrollable Tooltips: Tooltips going off screen? This fixes that. [https://sk1er.club/mods/text_overflow_scroll](https://sk1er.club/mods/text_overflow_scroll)</br>
- Windowed Fullscreen: Allows you to go onto other tabs with Minecraft in fullscreen mode. [https://sk1er.club/mods/sk1er_fullscreen](https://sk1er.club/mods/sk1er_fullscreen)</br>

Hope You Enjoy It!
